pull_request.title: Bump the openrewrite group with 6 updates
pull_request.body:
Bumps the openrewrite group with 6 updates: | Package | From | To | | --- | --- | --- | | [org.openrewrite:rewrite-java](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite) | `8.74.3` | `8.75.0` | | [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-testing-frameworks](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks) | `3.28.0` | `3.29.0` | | [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-migrate-java](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java) | `3.28.0` | `3.29.0` | | [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-static-analysis](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis) | `2.28.0` | `2.29.0` | | [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-joda](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-joda) | `0.7.0` | `0.7.1` | | [org.openrewrite.maven:rewrite-maven-plugin](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin) | `6.30.0` | `6.32.0` | Updates `org.openrewrite:rewrite-java` from 8.74.3 to 8.75.0
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite:rewrite-java's releases.

8.75.0

What's Changed

  • Python: Fix RPC write_message to use binary mode on Windows by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6850
  • Support empty JSP documents, or documents only containing comments by @​evie-lau in openrewrite/rewrite#6846
  • Python: Update ty-types dependency to released 0.0.19 by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6853
  • Fix IllegalArgumentException in Input.getRelativePath for relative paths by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6843
  • Python: Add f-string support for Python template/pattern API by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6854
  • Use version patterns in ChangeDependencyGroupIdAndArtifactId tests by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6856
  • Support escaping property placeholders with backslash by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite#6817
  • Python: Add context, dependencies, and configure() to Python Template/Pattern by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6855
  • Clean up .context/ directory by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6859
  • Fix print idempotency for annotated array type casts by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6861
  • Handle unresolved Maven credential placeholders gracefully by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6845
  • Fix Maven parser on ${project.version} in parent reference by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite#6860
  • JavaScript: Fix Yaml.Mapping non-empty prefix error for nested flow mappings by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6864
  • JavaScript: Fix three found JS/TS parse failures by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6863
  • Ensure ImportLayoutStyles can be merged by @​sambsnyd in openrewrite/rewrite#6862
  • JavaScript: Fix stack overflow in Type.signature for cyclic parameterized types by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6867
  • JavaScript: Fix empty named imports parse failure and add validator to parseProject() by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6866
  • Fix GradleWrapperTest after Gradle 9.4.0 got released by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6871
  • fix: KotlinVisitor.visitAnnotatedExpression now traverses inner expression by @​thake in openrewrite/rewrite#6870
  • Skip recipe validation for imperative recipes in assertRecipesConfigure() by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite#6841

New Contributors

  • @​thake made their first contribution in openrewrite/rewrite#6870

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.74.3...v8.75.0

Commits
  • bf2ca3c Skip recipe validation for imperative recipes in assertRecipesConfigure() (#6...
  • c4b475f fix: KotlinVisitor.visitAnnotatedExpression now traverses inner expression (#...
  • fda3bb6 gradle 9.4.0 (#6871)
  • 5d63b43 JavaScript: Fix empty named imports parse failure and add validator to `parse...
  • 8c7b901 Fix stack overflow in Type.signature for cyclic parameterized types (#6867)
  • ba0522f Peter helpfully pointed out that there are some circumstances where we would ...
  • 599f119 Fix three JS/TS parse failures found in Moderne run (#6863)
  • 56862e9 Fix Yaml.Mapping non-empty prefix error for nested flow mappings (#6864)
  • f4a3315 Fix Maven parser on ${project.version} in parent reference (#6860)
  • 3168539 Fix UpgradePluginVersion suppressing download failures
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

Updates `org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-testing-frameworks` from 3.28.0 to 3.29.0
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-testing-frameworks's releases.

3.29.0

What's Changed

  • Detect JUnit version in PowerMockitoMockStaticToMockito by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#919
  • ReplacePowerMockito: ensure mockito-core is added when PowerMock is removed by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#920
  • Remove all remaining PowerMock dependencies in ReplacePowerMockito recipe by @​steve-aom-elliott in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#921
  • Add JUnit 4 support to AddMockitoExtensionIfAnnotationsUsed by @​bmuschko in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#922
  • Use mockito-inline instead of mockito-core where applicable by @​bmuschko in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#923
  • Add recipe to replace MockitoTestExecutionListener by @​steve-aom-elliott in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#924
  • Remove empty constructors and suite() methods in MigrateJUnitTestCase by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#926

New Contributors

  • @​bmuschko made their first contribution in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#922

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks/compare/v3.28.0...v3.29.0

Commits
  • 7796693 Remove empty constructors and suite() methods in MigrateJUnitTestCase (#926)
  • 5c07d95 Add recipe to replace MockitoTestExecutionListener (#924)
  • f1b202d Use mockito-inline instead of mockito-core where applicable (#923)
  • 63820f4 Add JUnit 4 support to AddMockitoExtensionIfAnnotationsUsed (#1932) (#922)
  • e8bbdf0 Remove all remaining PowerMock dependencies in ReplacePowerMockito recipe (#921)
  • 0e3d076 ReplacePowerMockito: ensure mockito-core is added when PowerMock is removed (...
  • af19fad Detect JUnit version in PowerMockitoMockStaticToMockito (#919)
  • See full diff in compare view

Updates `org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-migrate-java` from 3.28.0 to 3.29.0
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-migrate-java's releases.

3.29.0

What's Changed

  • Add entries to .gitignore by @​zieka in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#995
  • Add @​RequiredArgsConstructor and @​AllArgsConstructor recipes by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#996
  • Use classpathFromResources for lombok in Java templates by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#997
  • Fix IfElseIfConstructToSwitch type attribution for non-JDK types by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#994

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java/compare/v3.28.0...v3.29.0

Commits
  • 42fd45a [Auto] SDKMAN! Java candidates as of 2026-03-02T1038
  • 53b3725 Fix IfElseIfConstructToSwitch type attribution for non-JDK types (#994)
  • eec22b2 Use classpathFromResources for lombok in Java templates (#997)
  • c0f7b7d Add @​RequiredArgsConstructor and @​AllArgsConstructor recipes (#996)
  • aa49b8f Add entries to .gitignore (#995)
  • See full diff in compare view

Updates `org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-static-analysis` from 2.28.0 to 2.29.0
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-static-analysis's releases.

2.29.0

What's Changed

  • Remove mutable static field in ChainStringBuilderAppendCalls by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis#822
  • ChainStringBuilderAppendCalls should not flatten a single argument by @​motlin in openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis#823

New Contributors

  • @​motlin made their first contribution in openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis#823

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis/compare/v2.28.0...v2.29.0

Commits
  • 63586c0 Add failing test for spacing of single method invocation argument in append()...
  • 017d753 Remove mutable static field in ChainStringBuilderAppendCalls (#822)
  • See full diff in compare view

changed_files.patch:
@@ -764,7 +764,7 @@
                 <plugin>
                     <groupId>org.openrewrite.maven</groupId>
                     <artifactId>rewrite-maven-plugin</artifactId>
-                    <version>6.30.0</version>
+                    <version>6.32.0</version>
                     <configuration>
                         <!-- do not set <configLocation> here, otherwise it cannot be overridden by a system property later -->
                         <exclusions>
@@ -781,27 +781,27 @@
                         <dependency>
                             <groupId>org.openrewrite</groupId>
                             <artifactId>rewrite-java</artifactId>
-                            <version>8.74.3</version>
+                            <version>8.75.2</version>
                         </dependency>
                         <dependency>
                             <groupId>org.openrewrite.recipe</groupId>
                             <artifactId>rewrite-testing-frameworks</artifactId>
-                            <version>3.28.0</version>
+                            <version>3.29.0</version>
                         </dependency>
                         <dependency>
                             <groupId>org.openrewrite.recipe</groupId>
                             <artifactId>rewrite-migrate-java</artifactId>
-                            <version>3.28.0</version>
+                            <version>3.29.0</version>
                         </dependency>
                         <dependency>
                             <groupId>org.openrewrite.recipe</groupId>
                             <artifactId>rewrite-static-analysis</artifactId>
-                            <version>2.28.0</version>
+                            <version>2.29.0</version>
                         </dependency>
                         <dependency>
                             <groupId>org.openrewrite.recipe</groupId>
                             <artifactId>rewrite-joda</artifactId>
-                            <version>0.7.0</version>
+                            <version>0.7.1</version>
                         </dependency>
                     </dependencies>
                 </plugin>
